pages.title: 印: seal pillar
pages.text: After writing $(l)印$(), the circle closes and asks you to right-click a block. Once selected, the self-casting circle opens again for the second glyph.$(br2)Currently sealable: $(l)净$(), $(l)泉$(), and $(l)息$(). If you write the wrong glyph or one that is not connected yet, the seal attempt ends with a message.

pages.title: 净 seal
pages.text: $(l)净 seal$() is a standing cleanse pillar. When you enter its range, it clears 1 negative effect. The same pillar can trigger for you only once every 60 seconds.$(br2)It does not handle ink wound. Write $(l)净$() directly for that.

pages.title: 泉 seal
pages.text: Writing $(l)泉$() directly gives an instant heal, not saturation. Writing it with the inscription circle heals near the marked block.$(br2)$(l)泉 seal$() becomes an area spring: while inside, you heal automatically on an interval without standing still. Better staves increase range and speed.

pages.title: 息 seal
pages.text: $(l)息 seal$() is more like a temporary camp. Stand still inside its range for 3 seconds, then you start receiving small health and hunger recovery.$(br2)Moving resets the timer. Leaving the range stops it. It is for post-fight cleanup, not healing while running.

pages.title: Ink field
pages.text: Write $(l)墨$() directly to unfold an ink field around you. The black-and-white ink filter is the cost paid by the caster.$(br2)Inside the field, your damage and healing are much stronger, but writing other glyphs wears the stave faster.

pages.title: Ink field cost
pages.text: Monsters inside the field become tougher, hit harder, move faster, and more actively close in. The field also supplements monsters near its edge until enough enemies are nearby.$(br2)Kills inside the field can drop $(l)ink cores$(). The black particle ring marks the boundary.

pages.title: Cleanup
pages.text: You can keep at most 3 seal pillars in the same dimension. If you exceed the limit, the oldest one fades. Breaking the pillar's block ends the seal.$(br2)Death, leaving the game, or changing dimensions clears seals and ink fields.
